_comment: Registry of editable site text for the private /admin editor. Each entry: 'key' matches a data-edit="key" attribute in index.html; 'default' is the original copy (shown in the editor and used to restore); 'label' + 'section' organise the editor UI; 'multiline' picks a textarea vs a single-line input. Hannah's saved edits live in R2 (content/site.json) and are layered over these defaults at page load — if empty, the hardcoded HTML copy shows. Editing a field with inline emphasis (e.g. the bio) replaces it with plain text. Prices, FAQ and structured data are NOT edited here.

fields.label: Section heading
fields.default: See what people are saying about us

fields.label: Section heading
fields.default: Hi, I'm Hannah!

fields.label: Bio paragraph 1
fields.default: For years, I've had the privilege of working with youth centres and churches, creating fun and inviting environments for kids and young people. Whether it's through a themed event or a decorated space I've always loved finding ways to bring excitement and energy to a room.

fields.label: Bio paragraph 2
fields.default: Since having my own kids, I've loved creating special celebrations for them and their friends. From themed backdrops to oversized balloon garlands, I'm constantly dreaming up ways to bring their ideas to life, creating party spaces that make them walk in and think, "Wow, this is the best day ever!"

fields.label: Bio paragraph 3
fields.default: That love for celebrating life's special moments inspired me to start Hooray HQ. My hope is that through this business, I can help make your birthday, anniversary, graduation, baby shower, or special event feel just that little bit more elevated. Because I know the moments that matter most deserve a HOORAY!

fields.default: Think click & collect, but balloons! Fuss-free styling with no complex install — pick your colours, choose your size, and collect ready to celebrate.

fields.label: Intro paragraph
fields.default: Custom garlands, themed event styling, and oversized statement installations designed to make your celebration unforgettable — from birthdays and baby showers to grand openings and anniversaries. Tell us your vision and we'll bring it to life.

fields.default: Have a question, or want to chat about your celebration? Drop us a message and we'll get right back to you.
